title: 10 best herbal creams for cystitis
description: Maidenhair tree creams helps with cystitis because they contain potent anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds derived from the leaves of the Ginkgo biloba plant. These extracts have been traditionally used to soothe urinary tract discomfort and reduce inflammation, which are common symptoms associated with cystitis.
